name: codex-guidance
description: Path-scoped Markdown guidance for Codex sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Load path-scoped Markdown guidance into Codex.
interface.longDescription: Codex Guidance injects user and repository Markdown guidance at session start, after matching reads, and before matching edits.
defaultPrompt: Use repository guidance before editing matching files.
Load my global Codex guidance for this session.
Apply path-scoped guidance while working in this repo.
